SF Planning", "url": "https://sfplanning.org/housing-resources", "snippet": "[Jina Parallel Content] Title: Housing Resources | SF Planning URL Source: https://sfplanning.org/housing-resources Markdown Content: The Housing Resource guide is for individuals experiencing homelessness or housing insecurity. Use this list to find Homeless Services, Rental Services & Eviction Assistance, Tenant Rights, and Affordable Housing in San Francisco. This list was created in partnership with community organizations and the [Mayor\u2019s Office of Housing and Community Development.](https://sf.gov/departments/mayors-office-housing-and-community-development \"website\") The Housing Resource guide is available in seven languages: _The services and resources provided are subject to change. To report a correction or request to be added, please contact: [CPC.CommunityPlanning@sfgov.org](mailto:CPC.CommunityPlanning@sfgov.org)_ **Homeless Services & Resources** [**Homeless Shelters**](https://sfserviceguide.org/shelter-resources/form \"website\") Find a shelter for you or your family\u2019s needs with this list. You can filter by age, household size and more. _Available languages: English, Espa\u00f1ol, Filipino, \u4e2d\u6587_ [**Coordinated Entry, Department of Homelessness & Supportive Housing**](https://hsh.sfgov.org/services/how-to-get-services/referrals-and-housing-assistance/ \"website\") If you are at risk of or currently experiencing homelessness, contact a Coordinated Entry Access Point to get assistance. Access Point staff provide problem solving support and assess your needs. _Available languages: English, Espa\u00f1ol, \u4e2d\u6587,Filipino, \u0627\u0644\u0639\u0631\u0628\u064a\u0629_ [**Shelter Client Advocacy**](https://evictiondefense.org/services/shelter-client-advocacy/ \"website\") For assistance with a Denial of Service (DOS) or an issue at a City-funded homeless shelter or transitional housing site, contact the [Eviction Defense Collaborative](https://evictiondefense.org/ \"website\") at (415) 669-0284 or email [sca@evictiondefense.org](mailto:sca@evictiondefense.org \"website\"). _Available languages: English, Espa\u00f1ol, \u4e2d\u6587_\n...\nTitle: Housing Resources | SF Planning URL Source: https://sfplanning.org/housing-resources Markdown Content: The Housing Resource guide is for individuals experiencing homelessness or housing insecurity. Use this list to find Homeless Services, Rental Services & Eviction Assistance, Tenant Rights, and Affordable Housing in San Francisco. This list was created in partnership with community organizations and the [Mayor\u2019s Office of Housing and Community Development.](https://sf.gov/departments/mayors-office-housing-and-community-development \"website\") The Housing Resource guide is available in seven languages: _The services and resources provided are subject to change. To report a correction or request to be added, please contact: [CPC.CommunityPlanning@sfgov.org](mailto:CPC.CommunityPlanning@sfgov.org)_ **Homeless Services & Resources** [**Homeless Shelters**](https://sfserviceguide.org/shelter-resources/form \"website\") Find a shelter for you or your family\u2019s needs with this list.
